title: ConjugationPolicy
description: Policy controlling conjugation pair detection, charge-conjugation symmetry checks, and Majorana condition enforcement in the Phase IV fermionic pipeline.

policyId.description: Unique identifier for this conjugation policy

conjugationConventionId.description: Reference to the conjugation convention used (must match spinor spec)

conjugatePairMatchThreshold.description: Minimum inner-product overlap to identify a mode as a conjugate partner

reportConjugatePairs.description: Whether to report detected conjugate pairs in fermion mode records

checkMajoranaCondition.description: Whether to check and report the Majorana self-conjugacy condition

majoranaResidualThreshold.description: Maximum residual ||psi - C psi^*|| / ||psi|| for Majorana candidate classification

demoteOnUnpairedModes.description: Whether to demote candidates with unpaired conjugate modes when pairing is expected

eigenvalueSymmetryTolerance.description: Tolerance for checking that conjugate pairs have equal-magnitude eigenvalues
